# Specs

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

This directory holds implementation-level specs for active or recently completed work.

## Naming Convention

```
YYYY-MM-DD-<short-slug>.md
```

Example: `2026-05-11-upload-api-eu-region-support.md`

## Spec Status

Each spec should include a status header:

```markdown
**Status:** Draft | In Progress | Done
```

Mark specs as `Done` once the feature ships rather than deleting them — they serve as historical implementation context.

## Current Specs

_No active specs yet. Add one when starting meaningful new work._
